sobre.title: Who I am
sobre.description: I'm Leonardo Nadson, a full-stack developer focused on creating functional and well-structured interfaces. I like to transform ideas into code and seek solutions that make a difference. I'm always exploring new technologies and improving my skills to deliver quality projects.
